title: Project Alpha
description: A full-stack web application with real-time features and modern architecture.
longDescription: Built with React and Node.js, this project showcases real-time collaboration features using WebSockets. Deployed on AWS with CI/CD pipelines.

title: Project Beta
description: Cross-platform mobile app for productivity and task management.
longDescription: React Native application supporting iOS and Android. Features offline-first architecture with local sync.

title: Project Gamma
description: Brand identity and design system for a startup.
longDescription: Complete brand identity project including logo, typography system, color palette, and component library in Figma.
